steps.title: Name the language feature
steps.content: The student wants to explain why Cree is classified as synthetic. The relevant notes define synthetic languages by extensive case systems, where nouns take different forms depending on their function. A strong answer must connect Cree to that feature.

steps.title: Reject incomplete explanations
steps.content: Choice A mostly describes analytic languages. Choice B says synthetic languages indicate noun function but leaves out the case-system mechanism. Choice D says nouns fulfill functions but does not explain that they change form. The sentence that links Cree's case system to noun forms gives the needed explanation. The answer is C.
